project: Solar Estimate Premium — explainers, transparency, volumetric grounding, AI panel preview

context.app: quotemate-automation (Next.js 16 App Router, Tailwind v4, vitest, strict TS)
surfaces: app/q/solar/[token]/page.tsx (results page, server component, no client JS)
invariants: Money path stays deterministic — no LLM in any $ figure
Confirm gate: prices hidden until solar_estimates.confirmed_at
satellite_image_url stays a REAL photo; AI image is a separate, clearly-labelled field
All displayed numbers trace to persisted estimate fields — no invented values
Maintain design system (ink-deep navy, #FF5A1F accent, Manrope/JetBrains Mono, square corners, borders not shadows)
Keep existing data-testids — playwright e2e depends on them

stories.title: Per-stat explainer view models (lib/solar/explainers.ts)
stories.description: Pure builder buildSolarStatExplainers(estimate) returning four explainer view models — systemSize, panels, orientation, yearlyOutput. Each carries: a plain-English answer to 'why this number?', fact rows (label/value/note), and ordered derivation steps. System size: roof capacity kW, export limit kW + export_limited flag, panel wattage, tier maths. Panels: usable_area_m2, max_panels_count, selected count, area-per-panel. Orientation: primary orientation, per-plane azimuth/pitch/area table, hemisphere note (north-facing best in AU). Yearly output: DC estimate -> derate_applied -> AC, low/high band, CEC benchmark cross-check, degradation. Handles google AND manual coverage_source with distinct copy; null-safe (empty planes, null pitch/azimuth).
acceptance: Unit tests cover google + manual paths, null-safety, and that every displayed figure equals the source estimate field

stories.title: Transparent assumptions view models (lib/solar/assumptions-view.ts)
stories.description: Pure builder buildSolarAssumptionsView(estimate) returning rows for: self-consumption %, retail rate, feed-in tariff (resolved network), STC parameters (zone rating, deeming years, certificates, $/STC from headline tier stc breakdown), DC->AC derate, panel degradation, config version + band. Each row: label, value, source (where it came from: config version, DNSP network, CER postcode zone, Google imagery), meaning (one plain sentence), sensitivity (which direction it moves savings/payback).
acceptance: Unit tests: both paths, network-default fallback, STC zone derivation matches price.tiers[].stc

stories.title: Results page premium upgrade with expandable explainers + transparent assumptions
stories.description: Rework app/q/solar/[token]/page.tsx: native <details> expandable explainer under each hero stat tile (server-rendered, no client JS) fed by S1; assumptions section becomes a transparent value/source/meaning/sensitivity layout fed by S2; add topographic SVG background + staggered fade-up reveals (existing keyframes); keep confidence chip, confirm gate, compliance copy, tier cards, orange closing bar. Mobile-first.

stories.title: Brief form premium polish (frontend-design pass)
stories.description: Elevate /solar/[tenantSlug] entry page + SolarAddressForm: staggered entrance reveals, trust points visible on mobile, refined focus/hover micro-interactions, postcode input pattern (4 digits), polished manual-details section, submit button progress copy. Behaviour, payload, and all data-testids unchanged.

stories.title: Volumetric grounding for the manual fallback path
stories.description: manual-fallback.ts currently ignores orientation and geography. Add config-driven orientation yield factors (north 1.0 ... south ~0.80, AU hemisphere) and optional state-specific manual benchmark (manual_benchmark_by_state), both with safe defaults in config.ts; manual path multiplies declared-orientation factor into the synthetic panel_config yearly_energy_dc_kwh. Google path untouched (already volumetric). Confidence stays wide on manual.
acceptance: manual-fallback/production/intake tests updated + new cases for orientation derate and state benchmark
Guardrails (CEC +/-35%) still pass for all orientations/states

stories.title: AI-generated roof-with-panels concept image
stories.description: Mirror lib/roofing/roof-after.ts blueprint: migration 102 adds solar_estimates.panels_image_path + panels_image_status (idle/generating/ready/failed); lib/solar/panels-after-prompt.ts (pure, unit-tested) builds a Gemini brief grounded on panel count/orientation/system size; lib/solar/panels-after.ts CAS-claims status, fetches the real satellite image, renders via ig-engine gemini provider, uploads to storage, updates row; triggered in estimate route after() (soft-fail without GEMINI_API_KEY; skipped on manual path with no satellite image); GET /api/solar/q/[token]/panels-after proxy mirrors static-map; results page renders it beside the aerial image labelled 'AI-generated concept — not a design document'.
acceptance: Page renders gracefully when image absent/failed

stories.title: Full quality gates + completion promise
stories.description: Run npx tsc --noEmit, pnpm lint, pnpm test (full vitest suite), pnpm build. Fix everything. Completion promise: All tests pass.
